def: Before the singular of an object that starts with a consonant.
To refer to the person who is speaking or writing.
Before the singular of an object that starts with a vowel.
Before any amount of an object that starts with any letter.
A feline animal with four legs and a tail that is fluffy and commonly does an action called purring and makes a "meow" sound.
A canine animal similar to a cat that instead makes a "bark" sound that sounds like "woof".
A cloud on the ground, usually at high places
A type of plant that can only be green and produces seeds and dies usally at the end of spring or early summer.
Usually refers to a mean person who hurt the speaker physically or emotionally.
